title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: IBM and Red Hat announced Project Lightwell, a $5 billion initiative to secure the open source ecosystem through AI-augmented engineering and a trusted security clearinghouse. The project aims to address vulnerabilities in open source software that powers over 90% of Fortune 500 companies.
